issues.body: The edited composability paragraph still says `Honest majority enjoys UC WITHOUT setup`. The new posture record correctly narrows this to no CRS/PKI given ideal authenticated/private channels, broadcast where required, and the UC session/scheduling model. Leaving the old absolute wording in a linked synthesis record preserves the prior round's security overclaim and makes the documentation internally inconsistent.
issues.fix_hint: Replace `UC WITHOUT setup` with the same narrow formulation used by the new posture record: UC without a CRS/PKI trust root only given the theorem's specified authenticated/private communication resources, broadcast where required, and UC session/scheduling assumptions; state that applicability to current in-process code is aspirational.
issues.title: Companion record retains the unqualified UC-without-setup claim

issues.body: The new sentence says `the open is justified only against the bit-leaking F_join carried downstream`. But the new posture record expressly says the lemma is not a proof that secure_equal realizes F_join: the distributed protocol, complete adversarial views, and simulator remain absent. Calling the open `justified` against F_join promotes the limited distribution lemma back into the realization/composition conclusion rejected in round 1.
issues.fix_hint: Say that the record characterizes the honest masked opening as revealing only the match bit, requires a bit-leaking F_join in any future composition proof, and leaves realization/composition justification conditional on a distributed protocol and full-view simulator.
issues.title: Capability matrix overstates the masked-opening lemma as F_join justification

verdict.summary: Round 2 materially improves the new posture record: it now makes composition conditional on future distributed realizations and explicitly states the authenticated/private-channel, broadcast, session, and scheduling assumptions. However, two edited companion records still preserve or introduce the exact overclaims that the new record corrects. One still says honest-majority UC is without setup without qualifying the required communication resources, and another says the open is justified against F_join even though the new record establishes only a masked-opening leakage lemma and says realization of F_join remains pending. Because these are outward MPC soundness claims on an audit-gated surface, the cross-document inconsistency is major and must be fixed before approval.
